ModMetadata.Name: Custom Decals
ModMetadata.Author: KingBR
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: [h3]Version 1.1[/h3] [list] [*] Added support for vanilla/modded sprites as decals. Use command: "[b]listgamesprites [searchString][/b]" to get the list of all available sprites. searchString is optional, if provided it will filter the sprites that contain the searchString in their name. [/list] [h3]Version 1.0[/h3] [list] [*] First release [/list]
ModMetadata.Description:
[b]Custom Decals - Placeable Signs and Images[/b]
Add customizable decals (constructed with a Kit Sign) to your base in Stationeers. Using both built-in game assets (including modded ones) and user-provided images.
[hr]
[b]Features[/b]
[list] [*] Placeable decal structures (similar to signs) [*] Support for custom PNG images [*] Independent front and back decals [*] Adjustable width and height per side [*] In-game reload command to reload user provided images (reloaddecals) [/list]
[hr]
[b]Custom Decals[/b]
built-in decals:
[list] [*] Warning [*] Hazard [*] Danger_Eletricity [*] All game sprites (e.g. inventory/UI icons, vanilla/modded items thumbnails etc.). Use command: "[b]listgamesprites [searchString][/b]" to get the list of all available sprites. searchString is optional, if provided it will filter the sprites that contain the searchString in their name. [/list]
How to add your own images:
[olist] [*] Launch the game with the mod installed at least once to generate the config files [*] Navigate to in your file explorer: "[b]Stationeers/BepInEx/config/CustomDecals/Decals/[/b]" [*] Add your .png files [*] Run the following command to reload the decals, no need to restart the game: "[b]reloaddecals[/b]" [/olist]
[hr]
[b]Configuration Format[/b]
Decals are configured using the item's name (changed using a labeller, case insensitive): "[b]front decal;back decal;widthFront;heightFront;widthBack;heightBack[/b]" or "[b]decal;width;height[/b]"
Example: "[b]danger_eletricity;hazard;1;1;3;3[/b]" or "[b]icon-oxygen;1.5;1.5[/b]"
[hr]
[b]Notes[/b]
[list] [*] Only PNG images are supported for custom decals [*] Image size is recommended to be 1024x1024 or smaller, but larger images will also work [/list]
[hr]
[b]Requirements[/b]
[list] [*][url=https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad] Stationeers Launch Pad[/url] [/list]
[b]Links[/b] [list] [*]Support:[url=https://discord.gg/UxzsWmwrpR] Stationeers Modding Discord[/url] [*]Source Code:[url=https://github.com/King-BR/Stationeers-CustomDecals] Github[/url] [/list]
